texto: You may be thinking that your company has a human resources person who will keep you out of trouble. This is a dangerous misconception. Whether your company has a massive Human Resources Department with hundreds of representatives or a small office with just a single representative, these HR reps are not your advocates. They work for the company, not for you.
explicacao: Citação de Johanna Harris sobre temas ligados a trabalho. “You may be thinking that your company has a human resources person who will keep you out of troub…” articula trabalho, careers, discrimination em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e discrimination.
